summary: The test suite is exceptionally thorough, covering script logic (cartesian products, filters, limits), workflow syntax (actionlint, YAML structure), and end-to-end execution (act). It correctly implements the requested act-result.txt logging and setup of temporary git repositories for integration testing. The primary flaw is architectural: it ignores the directive to run all tests through the GitHub Actions pipeline, instead relying on a separate unit test suite for the majority of the logic validation.
